subject: Create register_from_folder.py script
description:
Create a Python script that:
1. Scans a folder (e.g., BMT02-Siang/) containing person subfolders with .jpg images
2. Extracts face embeddings using DeepFace (Facenet512)
3. Inserts each image as a row into sicantik_uface_face_embeddings_facenet_cctv MySQL table
4. Has CLI args for --mitra, --max-images, --table-name, --dry-run, --skip-db
5. DB connection via env vars (DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_USER, DB_PASS, DB_NAME)
6. Proper logging and summary output
